title: helichrysum horridum
intro: Helichrysum horridum, also known as the rough helichrysum or rough everlast, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the Cape Provinces of South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of helichrysum horridum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection. The plant is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extractions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
